_meta.citation: ROADMAP SC-5: 50-scenario sweep MUST serialize under 100KB AND summary key MUST precede rows key in the indented JSON. Engine emits 37623 bytes via model_dump_json(indent=2) per Plan 08-05 verification (well under the 100KB ceiling per 08-RESEARCH §1.3 estimate). Rate list generated via [f"0.0{40+i:02d}000" for i in range(50)] per D-05-06 and committed verbatim.

notes: Verified at fixture-authoring time: model_dump_json(indent=2).encode('utf-8') length is 37623 bytes (under 100KB by ~2.7x). Rate-shock 50-cell sweep is the SC-5 size-budget pin. The byte-order check uses substring .find('"summary"') < .find('"rows"') on the indented JSON string per D-05-03.
